title: The Rebellion Regroups After Udon
description: On pages 15–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Orochi, Unknown person #14, Law as After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
scene: After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Why, I'll guide you, of course.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The Bandit's Bridge in Ringo, Right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I need to get it back before the final battle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You do not know the value of this famed blade, Shusui!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: I won't forgive that bastard Orochi...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll get revenge for tonyasu. I swear it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Let's just get this over with.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The sooner you talk, the sooner this will be over.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This man's crew and the straw hats are connected.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The indomi- table law! Next issue, a color cover!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What in the world are you plotting in Wano?! Time for you to spill the beans.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Rebellion Regroups storyline with 18 dialogue beats. After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
